title: Red Geometric Hand Block Print Cotton Sarong, Handcrafted Cotton Pareo Sarong for Beach & Resort Wear, Wrap Skirt, Scarf / Beach Cover Up
description:
Hand Block Printed Sarong with Golden Zari Border – Description

This hand block printed sarong is beautifully crafted from soft, breathable fabric and finished with an elegant golden zari border, adding a touch of traditional luxury to a relaxed, versatile wrap. Each piece is individually printed using hand-carved wooden blocks, making every sarong unique.

The shimmering golden zari border enhances the overall look, giving the sarong a refined, festive feel while still remaining lightweight and comfortable—perfect for both casual beachwear and elevated resort stylin

Key Features:

🌸 Material: 100% Cotton

✋ Hand Block Printing:
The design is created using hand-carved wooden blocks dipped in natural . Each block is carefully stamped by hand, resulting in slight variations that highlight the handcrafted nature of the sarong.

🎨 Designs & Motifs:
Patterns range from classic floral and paisley to geometric and ethnic motifs. Colors can be vibrant or subtle, depending on the design and technique.

📏 Size & Style:
Typically a large rectangular cloth (approx. 44 x 72 inches, though sizes vary). Can be worn as a beach wrap, skirt, dress, scarf, or used as a home textile — like a table cover or wall hanging.

💡 Style Tips:

Beachwear: Tie at the waist or drape over swimwear.

Casual Wear: Wrap as a skirt or strapless dress with a belt.

🧼 Care Instructions:
Hand wash gently in cold water with mild detergent. Air dry in shade to preserve colors. Iron on low heat if needed.

Add a touch of timeless craftsmanship to your wardrobe or travel bag today!

International buyers: Special Notes: Our prices are inclusive of all customs Duties / Tariff / VAT and other cross border expenses, hence no need to worry about hidden charges. We are sending all goods as free shipping absolutely.

Hand Block Printed Sarong with Golden Zari Border – Description

This hand block printed sarong is beautifully crafted from soft, breathable fabric and finished with an elegant golden zari border, adding a touch of traditional luxury to a relaxed, versatile wrap. Each piece is individually printed using hand-carved wooden blocks, making every sarong unique.

The shimmering golden zari border enhances the overall look, giving the sarong a refined, festive feel while still remaining lightweight and comfortable—perfect for both casual beachwear and elevated resort stylin

Key Features:

🌸 Material: 100% Cotton

✋ Hand Block Printing:
The design is created using hand-carved wooden blocks dipped in natural . Each block is carefully stamped by hand, resulting in slight variations that highlight the handcrafted nature of the sarong.

🎨 Designs & Motifs:
Patterns range from classic floral and paisley to geometric and ethnic motifs. Colors can be vibrant or subtle, depending on the design and technique.

📏 Size & Style:
Typically a large rectangular cloth (approx. 44 x 72 inches, though sizes vary). Can be worn as a beach wrap, skirt, dress, scarf, or used as a home textile — like a table cover or wall hanging.

💡 Style Tips:

Beachwear: Tie at the waist or drape over swimwear.

Casual Wear: Wrap as a skirt or strapless dress with a belt.

🧼 Care Instructions:
Hand wash gently in cold water with mild detergent. Air dry in shade to preserve colors. Iron on low heat if needed.

Add a touch of timeless craftsmanship to your wardrobe or travel bag today!

International buyers: Special Notes: Our prices are inclusive of all customs Duties / Tariff / VAT and other cross border expenses, hence no need to worry about hidden charges. We are sending all goods as free shipping absolutely.

Patterns range from classic floral and paisley to geometric and ethnic motifs. Colors can be vibrant or subtle, depending on the design and technique.

reviews.comment:
I loved this item, I made an error by forgoing viewing measurements prior to purchase. Which is a must when plus sized. However I was able to gift it to my mother whom absolutely adored it full stop.

Please Read with Careful Consideration

I found my lack of knowledge lead to two drawbacks on this purchase. Upon opening the package there were no washing instructions, which leads me into my second concern. The odor when I opened the bag was, to me, a bit offensive. I am highly sensitive to smells I admit. I also admit at this time I mindlessly washed the sarong in my washer. This did significantly diminish the vibrancy of the printing. Washing directions ARE on posted in the listing though. Big plus for me. Shipping to the US did take a fortnight, however I purchased with NO rush in mind.
great order as described..slow shipping
Love this sarong!  Beautiful colors.

title: Hand Block Printed Cotton Sarong with Zari Border | Boho Cover Up | Summer Pareo, Handcrafted Cotton Beach Wrap, Wrap Skirt, Scarf, Cover Up
description:
Hand Block Printed Sarong with Golden Zari Border – Description

This hand block printed sarong is beautifully crafted from soft, breathable fabric and finished with an elegant golden zari border, adding a touch of traditional luxury to a relaxed, versatile wrap. Each piece is individually printed using hand-carved wooden blocks, making every sarong unique.

The shimmering golden zari border enhances the overall look, giving the sarong a refined, festive feel while still remaining lightweight and comfortable—perfect for both casual beachwear and elevated resort stylin

Key Features:

🌸 Material: 100% Cotton

✋ Hand Block Printing:
The design is created using hand-carved wooden blocks dipped in natural . Each block is carefully stamped by hand, resulting in slight variations that highlight the handcrafted nature of the sarong.

🎨 Designs & Motifs:
Patterns range from classic floral and paisley to geometric and ethnic motifs. Colors can be vibrant or subtle, depending on the design and technique.

📏 Size & Style:
Typically a large rectangular cloth (approx. 44 x 72 inches, though sizes vary). Can be worn as a beach wrap, skirt, dress, scarf, or used as a home textile — like a table cover or wall hanging.

💡 Style Tips:

Beachwear: Tie at the waist or drape over swimwear.

Casual Wear: Wrap as a skirt or strapless dress with a belt.

🧼 Care Instructions:
Hand wash gently in cold water with mild detergent. Air dry in shade to preserve colors. Iron on low heat if needed.

title: Beige Fish Print Sarong with Traditional Border – Hand Block Printed Cotton Beach Wrap, Handcrafted Cotton Beach Wrap, Wrap Skirt, Scarf
description:
Hand Block Printed Sarong with Golden Zari Border – Description

This hand block printed sarong is beautifully crafted from soft, breathable fabric and finished with an elegant golden zari border, adding a touch of traditional luxury to a relaxed, versatile wrap. Each piece is individually printed using hand-carved wooden blocks, making every sarong unique.

The shimmering golden zari border enhances the overall look, giving the sarong a refined, festive feel while still remaining lightweight and comfortable—perfect for both casual beachwear and elevated resort stylin

Key Features:

🌸 Material: 100% Cotton

✋ Hand Block Printing:
The design is created using hand-carved wooden blocks dipped in natural . Each block is carefully stamped by hand, resulting in slight variations that highlight the handcrafted nature of the sarong.

🎨 Designs & Motifs:
Patterns range from classic floral and paisley to geometric and ethnic motifs. Colors can be vibrant or subtle, depending on the design and technique.

📏 Size & Style:
Typically a large rectangular cloth (approx. 44 x 72 inches, though sizes vary). Can be worn as a beach wrap, skirt, dress, scarf, or used as a home textile — like a table cover or wall hanging.

💡 Style Tips:

Beachwear: Tie at the waist or drape over swimwear.

Casual Wear: Wrap as a skirt or strapless dress with a belt.

🧼 Care Instructions:
Hand wash gently in cold water with mild detergent. Air dry in shade to preserve colors. Iron on low heat if needed.

Patterns range from classic floral and paisley to geometric and ethnic motifs. Colors can be vibrant or subtle, depending on the design and technique.

📏 Size & Style:

💡 Style Tips:

Beachwear: Tie at the waist or drape over swimwear.

Casual Wear: Wrap as a skirt or strapless dress with a belt.

Hand wash gently in cold water with mild detergent. Air dry in shade to preserve colors. Iron on low heat if needed.

title: Boho Hand Block Print Cotton Sarong in Sage Green & Mustard | Beach Cover-Up, Handcrafted Cotton Beach Wrap, Wrap Skirt, Scarf, Cover Up
description:
Hand Block Printed Sarong with Golden Zari Border – Description

This hand block printed sarong is beautifully crafted from soft, breathable fabric and finished with an elegant golden zari border, adding a touch of traditional luxury to a relaxed, versatile wrap. Each piece is individually printed using hand-carved wooden blocks, making every sarong unique.

The shimmering golden zari border enhances the overall look, giving the sarong a refined, festive feel while still remaining lightweight and comfortable—perfect for both casual beachwear and elevated resort stylin

Key Features:

🌸 Material: 100% Cotton

✋ Hand Block Printing:
The design is created using hand-carved wooden blocks dipped in natural . Each block is carefully stamped by hand, resulting in slight variations that highlight the handcrafted nature of the sarong.

🎨 Designs & Motifs:
Patterns range from classic floral and paisley to geometric and ethnic motifs. Colors can be vibrant or subtle, depending on the design and technique.

📏 Size & Style:
Typically a large rectangular cloth (approx. 44 x 72 inches, though sizes vary). Can be worn as a beach wrap, skirt, dress, scarf, or used as a home textile — like a table cover or wall hanging.

💡 Style Tips:

Beachwear: Tie at the waist or drape over swimwear.

Casual Wear: Wrap as a skirt or strapless dress with a belt.

🧼 Care Instructions:
Hand wash gently in cold water with mild detergent. Air dry in shade to preserve colors. Iron on low heat if needed.

Add a touch of timeless craftsmanship to your wardrobe or travel bag today!

International buyers: Special Notes: Our prices are inclusive of all customs Duties / Tariff / VAT and other cross border expenses, hence no need to worry about hidden charges. We are sending all goods as free shipping absolutely.

title: Handmade Cotton Sarong – Traditional Block Print Beach Wrap, Soft & Breathable,Cotton Sarong for Beach /Resort Wear, Scarf / Beach Cover Up
description:
Hand Block Printed Sarong 

This hand block printed sarong is beautifully crafted from soft, breathable fabric and finished with an elegant , adding a touch of traditional luxury to a relaxed, versatile wrap. Each piece is individually printed using hand-carved wooden blocks, making every sarong unique.

The shimmering  enhances the overall look, giving the sarong a refined, festive feel while still remaining lightweight and comfortable—perfect for both casual beachwear and elevated resort stylin

Key Features:

🌸 Material: 100% Cotton

✋ Hand Block Printing:
The design is created using hand-carved wooden blocks dipped in natural . Each block is carefully stamped by hand, resulting in slight variations that highlight the handcrafted nature of the sarong.

🎨 Designs & Motifs:
Patterns range from classic floral and paisley to geometric and ethnic motifs. Colors can be vibrant or subtle, depending on the design and technique.

📏 Size & Style:
Typically a large rectangular cloth (approx. 44 x 72 inches, though sizes vary). Can be worn as a beach wrap, skirt, dress, scarf, or used as a home textile — like a table cover or wall hanging.

💡 Style Tips:

Beachwear: Tie at the waist or drape over swimwear.

Casual Wear: Wrap as a skirt or strapless dress with a belt.

title: Black Tribal Print Sarong Wrap Skirt – Boho Beach Cover Up,  Cotton Sarong for Beach & Resort Wear, Wrap Skirt, Scarf / Beach Cover Up |
description:
Hand Block Printed Sarong 

This hand block printed sarong is beautifully crafted from soft, breathable fabric and finished with an elegant , adding a touch of traditional luxury to a relaxed, versatile wrap. Each piece is individually printed using hand-carved wooden blocks, making every sarong unique.

The shimmering  enhances the overall look, giving the sarong a refined, festive feel while still remaining lightweight and comfortable—perfect for both casual beachwear and elevated resort stylin

Key Features:

🌸 Material: 100% Cotton

✋ Hand Block Printing:
The design is created using hand-carved wooden blocks dipped in natural . Each block is carefully stamped by hand, resulting in slight variations that highlight the handcrafted nature of the sarong.

🎨 Designs & Motifs:
Patterns range from classic floral and paisley to geometric and ethnic motifs. Colors can be vibrant or subtle, depending on the design and technique.

📏 Size & Style:
Typically a large rectangular cloth (approx. 44 x 72 inches, though sizes vary). Can be worn as a beach wrap, skirt, dress, scarf, or used as a home textile — like a table cover or wall hanging.

💡 Style Tips:

Beachwear: Tie at the waist or drape over swimwear.

Casual Wear: Wrap as a skirt or strapless dress with a belt.

🧼 Care Instructions:
Hand wash gently in cold water with mild detergent. Air dry in shade to preserve colors. Iron on low heat if needed.

title: Red Maze Print Beach Sarong with Golden Border | Block Printed Cotton Sarong | Artisan Beachwear Pareo | Cotton Beach Wrap, Wrap Skirt |
description:
Hand Block Printed Sarong with Golden Zari Border – Description

This hand block printed sarong is beautifully crafted from soft, breathable fabric and finished with an elegant golden zari border, adding a touch of traditional luxury to a relaxed, versatile wrap. Each piece is individually printed using hand-carved wooden blocks, making every sarong unique.

The shimmering golden zari border enhances the overall look, giving the sarong a refined, festive feel while still remaining lightweight and comfortable—perfect for both casual beachwear and elevated resort stylin

Key Features:

🌸 Material: 100% Cotton

✋ Hand Block Printing:
The design is created using hand-carved wooden blocks dipped in natural . Each block is carefully stamped by hand, resulting in slight variations that highlight the handcrafted nature of the sarong.

🎨 Designs & Motifs:
Patterns range from classic floral and paisley to geometric and ethnic motifs. Colors can be vibrant or subtle, depending on the design and technique.

📏 Size & Style:
Typically a large rectangular cloth (approx. 44 x 72 inches, though sizes vary). Can be worn as a beach wrap, skirt, dress, scarf, or used as a home textile — like a table cover or wall hanging.

💡 Style Tips:

Beachwear: Tie at the waist or drape over swimwear.

Casual Wear: Wrap as a skirt or strapless dress with a belt.

Doable, but annoying when I was expecting the buttons as pictured.

Canvas Tote Bag – Stylish, Durable & Everyday Essential

Carry style, strength, and sustainability wherever you go with this premium Canvas Tote Bag. Thoughtfully designed for daily use, this tote combines functionality with a timeless aesthetic, making it a must-have accessory for modern living. Whether you’re heading to work, college, the market, or a weekend outing, this bag fits seamlessly into your routine.

✨ Premium Quality Material

Made from high-quality, heavy-duty canvas fabric, this tote bag is durable, breathable, and built to withstand everyday wear and tear. The thick canvas ensures long-lasting use while maintaining a soft, natural feel. Strong stitching and reinforced seams add extra durability, allowing the bag to carry weight comfortably without losing its shape.

🤍 Comfortable to Carry

Equipped with sturdy shoulder handles, this tote bag can be comfortably carried by hand or over the shoulder. The handle length is thoughtfully designed to reduce strain, making it ideal for long hours of use during shopping trips, travel, or daily errands.

• Floral printed fabric handles and bottom trim

description:
Add warmth, comfort, and timeless style to your home with this beautifully crafted quilt. Designed to be both cozy and elegant, this quilt is perfect for everyday use or as a decorative accent on your bed, sofa, or guest room.

Made from high-quality fabric, it feels soft against the skin while remaining breathable and lightweight. The detailed stitching enhances durability and gives the quilt a classic handcrafted look. Suitable for all seasons, it provides gentle warmth in cooler weather and comfortable coverage during warmer months.

This versatile quilt blends easily with modern, bohemian, farmhouse, or traditional décor. It also makes a thoughtful gift for housewarmings, weddings, anniversaries, or festive occasions.

Features:

Soft, comfortable, and breathable fabric

Lightweight yet warm – ideal for all seasons

Durable stitching for long-lasting use

Easy to fold, store, and maintain

Perfect for bed, couch, or layering with blankets
✨ PURCHASE OPTIONS (Select Your Preferred Variant)

Option 1 – Quilt Only
• Includes one handcrafted cotton quilt
• Ideal for customers who already own pillow covers
• Lightweight, breathable & reversible
• Same premium artisan quality

Option 2 – Quilt with Matching Pillow Covers
• Includes 1 quilt + 2 coordinated pillow covers
• Matching floral hand block print for a complete look
• Pillow covers feature an envelope closure for a clean finish

🌸 PRODUCT DETAILS

• Made from 100% pure cotton
• Traditional hand block printing
• Soft, breathable & skin-friendly
• Reversible for extended use
• Comfortable for daily use
• Suitable for summer, AC rooms & mild winters
• Adds a bohemian, ethnic Indian touch to any space

• Pillow: 16 x 24 inches ( 41 x 61 cm )

• Pillow: 20 x 26 inches ( 51 x 66 cm )

reviews.comment: The item has a very strong odor, that caused me to become nauseous.  Spoke with the seller, and they said to mail it back at the cost of $150!  This because it is from India.  The item didn’t even cost that much.  I reluctantly had a friend wash it, and it still did not meet my expectations. Fabric was  TOO heavy, color is not yellow, and it looks frumpy not romantic.  It would need to be ironed as well to improve the presentation.  The photo makes it appear it is a lighter weight linen or  type of cotton.  But it is a heavy scratchy rough upholstery weight fabric.  Not good for a hot climate like Floria.  So I am stuck with spending over $150 dollars for a duvet that will not work. BUYER BEWARE.

title: Pink Floral Quilted Cotton Duffel Bag – Handmade Block Print Travel Bag Carryall / Everyday Travel Companion / Soft Cotton Duffel,Travel Bag
description:
🌍 International Buyers – Important Information

All our prices are inclusive of customs duties, tariffs, VAT, and other cross-border charges.

There are no hidden fees — you won’t need to pay anything extra upon delivery. Shop with complete confidence and peace of mind.
__________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Travel in style with this beautifully handcrafted indigo floral duffel bag. Made from soft, durable cotton and featuring a timeless blue and white handblock-inspired print, this bag blends elegance with everyday functionality.

Spacious and lightweight, it’s perfect for weekend getaways, gym sessions, beach trips, or as a stylish carry-on. The sturdy handles and adjustable shoulder strap provide comfortable carrying options, while the secure zipper closure keeps your essentials safe.

The classic botanical print adds a sophisticated, artisanal charm that makes this bag stand out wherever you go.

✨ Features

◆ Handmade using high-quality quilted cotton
◆ Secure top zipper closure
◆ Sturdy short top handles for hand carry
◆ Adjustable long shoulder strap for shoulder or crossbody use
◆ Lightweight & foldable – easy to pack and carry
◆ Eco-friendly & reusable
◆ Handmade in Rajasthan, India

📏 Size & Measurements (Approx.)

▸ Length: 18.5 inches
